CustomField.description: Date that the account moved from a BNP onboarding path to a non BNP onboarding path. (Previously Populated via flow: CF - Open and Operating Date Tracking) 6/4/25 DJ - Populated via flow: School Object - After Save - Updates. Updated to Read-Only
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date that the account moved from a BNP onboarding path to a non BNP onboarding path
CustomField.label: BNP Graduation Date
